evals.name: two-writer-setup
evals.prompt: Set up parallel worktrees for API and UI slices. API owns src/api/**, UI owns src/ui/**, both might touch package lockfile.
evals.expected_output: Creates/records worktree plan and resolves lockfile ownership before writers start.

evals.name: dirty-checkout
evals.prompt: Primary checkout has uncommitted changes. Create a worktree for a risky refactor.
evals.expected_output: Checks dirty status and avoids unsafe setup until state is addressed.

evals.name: read-only-near-miss
evals.prompt: Investigate where auth routes live; no edits yet.
evals.expected_output: Does not create worktree for read-only research.
assertions: routes to research/context rather than writer setup
